creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: FWIW, the next package build starts in ~8 hours at 25:00 UTC today (aka 01:00 UTC tomorrow). vulkan-{headers,loader} and libxkbcommon updates would trigger rebuild of all consumers gtk3/gtk4/qt5-gui/sdl2 consumers until https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/822. Having libglvnd in the same bandwagon would help "poudriere bulk -b <branch>" users to not wait again.
